name: Impossible Beef and Tomatoe Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease a 13 x 9 x 2-inch (5 x 8 x 5 cm) baking dish.
3. Layer beef, onion, celery, tomatoes, and cheese in the dish.
4. Beat remaining ingredients together until smooth: 15 seconds in a blender on high or 1 minute with an electric mixer on high.
5. Pour mixture into the dish.
6. Bake for 40-50 minutes, or 70-75 minutes at high altitude, until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Let cool for 5 minutes before serving. Garnish with parsley sprigs if desired.
8. Serves: 8-10 people.
